reports.thesis: Strongest honest long case for the BTC leg, rebutting the Bear directly: price holds above rising 20/50 EMAs on rising OI (new long money, not short-covering) and funding is only mildly positive so the move is not crowded. The Bear leans on neutral sentiment, but mid-tape balance in a low-vol uptrend has not historically capped a relative-value long that already clears carry; that concern is mispriced against confluent carry+factor signals.

signals.rebuts_bear: neutral sentiment is not a flip; long still clears funding+fees
